sentences.arabic: دَخَلَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ إِلَى مَتْحَفٍ كَبِيرٍ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je ušla u veliki muzej u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The family entered a large museum in the city.

sentences.translation: Vidjeli su stare slike i historijske predmete.
sentences.translationEn: They saw old paintings and historical objects.

sentences.translation: Djeci se svidio odjel sa životinjama.
sentences.translationEn: The children were impressed by the animal section.

sentences.arabic: قَضَوْا سَاعَتَيْنِ فِي الْمَتْحَفِ وَخَرَجُوا سُعَدَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Proveli su dva sata u muzeju i izašli sretni.
sentences.translationEn: They spent two hours in the museum and left happy.
